Stick.description: It's just a stick. Hard to use and not very strong.

Wrench.description: A heavy wrench. Hits harder than a stick.

Sword.description: Metal single-edged longsword with a sharp blade.

Shock Rod.description: An electrified rod that delivers a shocking blow. Zap!

Flame Thrower.description: Shoots fire. Everything is better with fire.

Laser Gun.description: Pew pew pew! A focused beam of pure energy.

Lightsabre.description: A laser sword. Very expensive! Bzzzzt.

Rocket Launcher.description: Fires explosive rockets. KABOOM! Not very accurate but who cares?

Chainsaw.description: VRRRRRR! A spinning chain of sharp teeth. One-handed destruction.

Plasma Cannon.description: Fires superheated plasma. Melts through anything.

Thunder Hammer.description: A massive hammer crackling with electricity. One hand. Maximum bonk.

Missile Launcher.description: Locks on and fires guided missiles. Explosions guaranteed.

Death Ray.description: A beam of pure destruction. Never misses. Ever.

Nuke Launcher.description: Launches a miniature nuclear warhead. Everything goes BOOM.

Antimatter Blade.description: A sword made of antimatter. Annihilates anything it touches.

Antimatter Missile Launcher.description: Fires antimatter missiles that erase things from existence. Each missile costs a fortune. Worth it.

Galaxy Destroyer.description: The ultimate weapon. Capable of destroying entire galaxies. Probably overkill for a robot fight.

Shotgun Shell.description: Allows you to fire a Shotgun weapon once. Consumed when fired.

Antimatter Missile.description: A missile made of antimatter. Consumed when launched. Erases anything it hits.

Cardboard Armor.description: Cheapest possible armor for a robot. Even a stick could break it.

Tin Armor.description: Shiny tin plates bolted together. Better than cardboard!

Iron Armor.description: Solid iron plating. Now we're talking.

Steel Armor.description: Industrial-grade steel. Tanks wish they had this.

Titanium Armor.description: Lightweight but incredibly strong. Space-age protection.

Diamond Armor.description: Coated in synthetic diamond. Sparkly AND tough.

Plasma Shield.description: A force field made of plasma. Sci-fi stuff. Very cool.

Cosmic Armor.description: Forged from the heart of a dying star. The ultimate protection.

Fourth Arm.description: Even more arms, even more weapons!

Fifth Arm.description: This is just silly. Who needs 5 arms?

Sixth Arm.description: SIX ARMS. You look like a spider now.

Gold Computer Chip.description: A computer chip that teaches the robot how to defend itself. Protect the face!

Small Computer Chip.description: A computer chip that teaches the robot how to dodge. If you can dodge a wrench...

Power Chip.description: A computer chip that boosts attack power. Your attacks deal 10% more damage!

Advanced Chip.description: Advanced dodge programming. Matrix-style bullet dodging.

Mega Chip.description: Advanced defense protocols. Takes 5 less damage per hit.

Quantum Chip.description: Quantum probability dodging. The robot exists in multiple places at once.

Money Maker.description: Earn more money from winning. It takes money to make money!

Propeller.description: A spinning propeller that helps the robot dodge attacks.

Small Battery.description: A small battery that increases energy capacity.

Medium Battery.description: A medium battery that increases energy capacity.

Big Battery.description: A big battery that increases energy capacity.

Mega Battery.description: A huge battery. Powers the big guns.

Nuclear Battery.description: Powered by nuclear fission. Don't drop it.

Fusion Battery.description: Powered by nuclear fusion. Clean energy! (Mostly.)

Dark Matter Core.description: Harvested from the void between galaxies. Infinite-ish energy.

Repair Kit.description: Repairs the robot. Duct tape and hope.

Throwing Net.description: It's a net. You throw it. Destroys the net.

Shield Boost.description: Temporarily hardens your armor. +5 defence for the battle.

Grenade.description: A small bomb you can launch at the enemy. BOOM!

EMP Bomb.description: Electromagnetic pulse. Scrambles their dodge circuits.

Mega Repair Kit.description: Industrial-grade repair tools. Welds, hammers, and lots of duct tape.

Mega Grenade.description: A BIGGER bomb. Shakes the whole arena.

Force Field.description: Projects a temporary force field. +15 defence for the battle.

Ultra Repair Kit.description: Nanotechnology repair swarm. Fixes everything instantly.

Plasma Grenade.description: Plasma-coated explosive. Melts and explodes at the same time!

Nuke.description: A miniature nuclear warhead. For when you absolutely need something destroyed.
